abstract: A publisher that exposes its elements as a throwing asynchronous sequence.
overview:
## Overview

`AsyncThrowingPublisher` conforms to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/AsyncSequence], which allows callers to receive values with the `for`-`await`-`in` syntax, rather than attaching a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscriber]. If the upstream publisher terminates with an error, `AsyncThrowingPublisher` throws the error to the awaiting caller.

Use the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher/values-v7nz] property of the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher] protocol to wrap an existing publisher with an instance of this type.
rawMarkdown:
--- source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/Combine/AsyncThrowingPublisher crawled: 2025-12-12T19:05:02Z --- # AsyncThrowingPublisher **Structure** A publisher that exposes its elements as a throwing asynchronous sequence. ## Declaration ```swift struct AsyncThrowingPublisher

where P : Publisher ``` ## Overview `AsyncThrowingPublisher` conforms to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/AsyncSequence], which allows callers to receive values with the `for`-`await`-`in` syntax, rather than attaching a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscriber]. If the upstream publisher terminates with an error, `AsyncThrowingPublisher` throws the error to the awaiting caller. Use the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher/values-v7nz] property of the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher] protocol to wrap an existing publisher with an instance of this type. ## Creating an asynchronous publisher - **init(_:)**: Creates a publisher that exposes elements received from an upstream publisher as a throwing asynchronous sequence. ## Creating an iterator - **makeAsyncIterator()**: Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence. - **AsyncThrowingPublisher.Iterator**: The iterator that produces elements of the asynchronous publisher sequence. ## Supporting types - **AsyncThrowingPublisher.Element**: The type of element produced by this asynchronous sequence. ## Asynchronous Publishers - **AsyncPublisher**: A publisher that exposes its elements as an asynchronous sequence. ## Conforms To - AsyncSequence
